Question: How many papayas did Paul have right before the trade with Charlie (where 1 papayas were transferred)?
failures.actual:
Based on the memory map, Paul gave **2 papayas** to Charlie (not 1 as stated in the question), and currently has 10 papayas. So right before the trade, Paul had **12 papayas**.
